name: simple_match_return
query: MATCH (u:User) RETURN u.name ORDER BY u.name

name: optional_match_missing
query: OPTIONAL MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.name = 'Cara' RETURN u.name AS name

name: with_scalar_rebinding
query: MATCH (u:User) WITH u.name AS name RETURN name ORDER BY name

name: grouped_count
query: MATCH (u:User) RETURN u.name AS name, count(*) AS total ORDER BY total DESC, name ASC

name: bounded_variable_length
query: MATCH (a:User)-[:KNOWS*1..2]->(b:User) WHERE a.name = 'Alice' RETURN b.name AS friend ORDER BY friend

name: graph_introspection
query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) RETURN id(a) AS uid, type(r) AS rel_type, startNode(r).id AS start_id, endNode(r).id AS end_id ORDER BY uid
